videos.headline: Georgia defense forces an unbelievable fumble
videos.description: Georgia's Raylen Wilson punches the ball loose just before Jackson Arnold has a chance to break the plane for Auburn.

videos.headline: Gunner Stockton dives into end zone for late Georgia TD
videos.description: Gunner Stockton calls his own number to put Georgia up 20-10 over Auburn.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gunner Stockton dives into end zone for late Georgia TD) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Gunner Stockton details Georgia's momentum shift vs. Auburn
videos.description: Stockton reflects on the Bulldogs' overall performance and describes how they were able to shift gears in the second half to pull off the 20-10 victory against the Tigers.
